strategy: Chilly's team resists 200% to every school normally, so raw attacks do nothing — the ONLY damage window is their polymorph, which hits every 5th round and lasts two rounds.
Spend rounds 1-4 stacking blades, traps, and a Feint; enter on time so they don't steal your pips.
On the round-5 polymorph they become Shadow school and vulnerable, so any school hits them — no prism needed for the burst.
Defeat Chilly during that round-5 window: doing so on round 5 skips the round-6 blade/trap strip and keeps the ghosts polymorphed and open the full two rounds.
If the fight drags, work down the takeover order (Chilly, then Achey, Sneezy, Cough), always hitting during a polymorph window.
cheatNotes: Join late (round 3+) and every Germ Ghost steals a pip from you. Enter at the start.
Every 5th round they polymorph for two rounds — this is the only window they take damage. Bank your blades and traps for it and unload.
They pass while polymorphed, so it is a completely safe window to set up and hit.
The polymorph turns them Shadow school, so any school damages them — no prism needed during the burst.
The polymorph reverts after two turns, so the damage window closes on the second round; land your kill inside it.
The polymorph cast never fizzles, even with Smoke Screen or other accuracy debuffs — don't waste a turn trying to stop it.
Every 6th round they strip all your blades and their own traps. Land your kill in the round-5 window before this hits.
If you defeat Chilly on round 5, the round-6 strip is skipped and the ghosts stay polymorphed and vulnerable the full two rounds — the cleanest line.
Kill order matters: when one falls, the next inherits the strip and polymorph cheats in the order Chilly, Achey, Sneezy, Cough. Work down the line.
